name: proc_creation_win_susp_script_exec_from_env_folder
raw_query: any where ((process.executable like~ ("*\\cscript.exe", "*\\mshta.exe", "*\\wscript.exe")) or (process.command_line like~ ("* -ep bypass *", "* -ExecutionPolicy bypass *", "* -w hidden *", "*/e:javascript *", "*/e:Jscript *", "*/e:vbscript *")) or (process.pe.original_file_name like~ ("cscript.exe", "mshta.exe", "wscript.exe"))) and ((process.command_line like~ ("*:\\Perflogs\\*", "*:\\Users\\Public\\*", "*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp*", "*\\AppData\\Roaming\\Temp*", "*\\Temporary Internet*", "*\\Windows\\Temp*")) or ((process.command_line:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Favorites\\*") or (process.command_line:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Favourites\\*") or (process.command_line:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Contacts\\*")))
